prompt: 帮我写一个 FrameDebuggerUtility 的反射封装类，不依赖 InternalAPIEditorBridge。需要包含：启用/禁用 FrameDebugger、获取帧事件数量、遍历每个事件提取 shader/pass/keyword 信息。使用 Delegate.CreateDelegate 做性能优化。

assertions.name: resolves-frame-debugger-types
assertions.text: Code resolves FrameDebuggerUtility and FrameDebuggerEventData types via Assembly.GetType in static constructor

assertions.name: uses-delegate-create-delegate
assertions.text: Uses Delegate.CreateDelegate for static method/property access (not MethodInfo.Invoke for simple methods)

assertions.name: has-set-enabled
assertions.text: Contains SetEnabled(bool, int) method wrapping the FrameDebuggerUtility.SetEnabled call

assertions.name: has-async-start-capture
assertions.text: Contains StartCapture with EditorApplication.update-based async capture loop

assertions.name: extracts-shader-pass-keywords
assertions.text: Extracts shaderName/passName/passIndex/shaderKeywords from FrameDebuggerEventData via reflection field accessors

assertions.name: data-class-complete
assertions.text: FrameDebuggerRawEvent data class includes index, shaderName, passIndex, passName, lightMode, shaderKeywords fields

assertions.name: null-safety
assertions.text: Uses null-conditional operators (?.) or explicit null checks on reflection delegates/field accessors

assertions.name: uses-activator-create-instance
assertions.text: Uses Activator.CreateInstance with 'true' parameter for internal type construction
